---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Richard Chenevix Trench"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Richard Chenevix Trench

**Dates:** (9 Sept 1807-27 Mar 1886)

### Description

Archbishop of Dublin

### Biography

He married (1 June 1832) his cousin the Hon. Frances Mary Trench (d. 5 Nov 1890). He served as Archbishop of Dublin 1864-84; he was a distinguished philologist;  he was first cousin once removed to T.R.F. Cooke Trench.

### Letters

- Letter from [February 1885]
- Letter from April 4 th [1876?]
- Letter from Feb 17th [1866]    

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
